visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a medium shot of a young female creator with long light brown hair and a black top. She is positioned behind a large pile of assorted skincare and makeup products in their original packaging. The setting is a brightly lit indoor space with a plain, neutral-colored background. (2) The creator brings 'Too Cool For School' lip products into close-up view. She proceeds to swatch three different shades on her left forearm, displaying varying intensities of pink and red. Her facial expressions are animated and enthusiastic as she looks directly at the camera. (3) She applies the lip velvet to her own lips using the wand applicator, demonstrating the texture. She then holds up a circular silver mirror to show the matte finish, pointing to her lips with a surprised and satisfied expression. Yellow and white captions appear on the screen to highlight product features. (4) The sequence continues with the presentation of an ABOUT TONE cushion compact, followed by a red TIRTIR cushion. She rotates the items to show all sides of the packaging. (5) She holds up a green and white Dr. Jart+ Soothing Spot kit, gesturing towards the small bottle inside to explain its contents. (6) A large white tube of LAGOM foam cleanser is shown, with the creator pointing to the brand name on the label. (7) She unboxes an orange TIRTIR mini cushion, removing it from its cardboard packaging to reveal the small, palm-sized container. (8) The creator presents a bottle of The Ordinary Niacinamide serum. She squeezes the dropper to apply a clear, viscous liquid onto the back of her hand, showing the product's consistency. (9) ISOI pink serum bottles and a box of eye patches are briefly showcased. (10) She opens a STUDIO 17 brush set, pulling out several makeup brushes of different sizes from a black mesh bag and showing them to the camera. (11) A white tube of Dr. Althea cream is presented. She humorously struggles to peel off the protective seal on the tube. (12) The final segment features an Oiad Liptique set, including a black cat-shaped pouch and two small tubes, one blue and one white, as she explains the 'lip tattoo' usage.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV 韓國人在OY買什麼. [Subtitle]: 看看我這次歐艾. (2) [Slogan]: OLIVE YOUNG 有環歐膩買了哪些?. (3) [Slogan]: Too Cool For School Sway Lip Velvet. [Variety]: 2號. (4) [Variety]: 11號. (5) [Variety]: 1號. (6) [Slogan]: 擦起來超輕透又貼服 嘴唇直接升級霧感. [Variety]: 霧面的. (7) [Variety]: 哇 不會沾到!!. (8) [Variety]: 根本我的菜. [Variety]: (不是業配喔笑死. (9) [Variety]: 中間加深一點點. (10) [Slogan]: ABOUT TONE Skin Layer Fit 氣墊粉餅. [Slogan]: 非常適合油性肌膚使用. (11) [Slogan]: TIRTIR. (12) [Slogan]: Dr.Jart+ + Ctrl-A Soothing Spot. [Variety]: 痘痘肌請注意!. (13) [Subtitle]: 這罐不能搖!. (14) [Subtitle]: 要等粉體沉澱後. (15) [Subtitle]: 用棉花棒直接沾底部點在肌膚上. (16) [Slogan]: LAGOM Cellup Micro 氣泡潔顏乳. (17) [Slogan]: TIRTIR Mask Fit Al Filter Mini 氣墊. (18) [Subtitle]: 是迷你版本. (19) [Slogan]: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1% 精華液. (20) [Subtitle]: 於鹼胺. (21) [Subtitle]: 可以跟平常用的精華或乳液混合一起擦. (22) [Subtitle]: 感覺有提亮膚色+整理角質的效果. (23) [Subtitle]: 膚質會比較乾淨. (24) [Subtitle]: 對亮膚有興趣的真的可以試試這罐. (25) [Subtitle]: 我自己也有買!. (26) [Slogan]: isoi 淡斑精華. (27) [Slogan]: STUDIO 17 修容刷具組. (28) [Slogan]: Dr. Althea 345 Relief Cream. [Variety]: 😂. (29) [Slogan]: Oiad Liptique. (30) [Subtitle]: 簡單說=Lip Tattoo.

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young female with long light brown hair, wearing a black sleeveless top, appearing in a brightly lit indoor studio or home environment.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A plain, minimalist indoor background with neutral-toned walls, likely a bedroom or a small studio setup for filming.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with high-energy, fast-tempo electronic pop music featuring a prominent synth melody and a driving electronic beat. A young female speaker introduces the video with a bright, enthusiastic, and high-pitched vocal tone. She speaks quickly in Mandarin with occasional Korean terms. (2) A sharp 'pop' or 'bubble' sound effect triggers as lip product names appear on the screen. The narrator's voice exhibits high pitch variability as she expresses excitement while swatching the products. Background music continues at a steady 128 BPM. (3) Subtle rustling sounds of plastic and cardboard are heard as she handles the various product boxes. Her speech rate remains fast and rhythmic, synchronized with the rapid visual cuts between different makeup items. (4) During the description of the Dr. Jart+ treatment, she uses a slightly more informative, narrative tone, with clear articulation. A 'whoosh' transition sound occurs between the different product categories. (5) In the final phase, the audio density remains high with continuous overlap between her cheerful voice and the upbeat BGM. The video ends with a warm, friendly sign-off as the music reaches a quick fade-out.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Introduction -> Product Carousel -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a variety of skincare and makeup products purchased from Olive Young in South Korea, providing quick reviews and demonstrations of their textures and effects to an audience interested in K-beauty.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator explicitly states in a caption that the content is not a paid advertisement ('不是業配喔').

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly energetic K-beauty haul video with high information density and social-media-native editing styles. The blend of Mandarin and Korean suggests a cross-cultural audience targeting.
